home.tagline: High-performance, minimalist P2P tracking engine. Search through our indexed database of verified torrents.
home.searchPlaceholder: Search torrents by name, tag or infohash…

login.title: Sign in
login.registrationsClosed: Registrations are currently closed. Only existing members can sign in.
login.registrationsInviteOnly: Registrations are by invitation only. You'll need a code from an existing member to create an account.
login.twoFactorPrompt: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app, a recovery code, or use a passkey.

errors.invalidCode: That code didn't match. Try again.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Try again later.

register.title: Create an account
register.passwordHint: Minimum 12 characters. Stronger is better — your password never leaves the browser.
register.panicPasswordHint: A second password used to encrypt sensitive data on demand. Cannot be recovered if forgotten.

errors.weakPassword: That password is too short or too predictable.
errors.invalidInvite: That invitation code is invalid or expired.

stats.activeSeeds: {n} active seed · {invites} invite | {n} active seeds · {invites} invites

credentials.title: Tracker credentials
credentials.warning: Never share this. Rotating it will break any torrent client still configured with the old announce URL.
credentials.useInClient: Use this in your torrent client. Includes your passkey.

activity.title: Activity
activity.noUploads: You haven't published any releases yet.

identity.usernameLocked: Your username is locked — it's tied to your announce URL and moderation history. Use a display name to change how you appear on profile pages without rotating your identity.
identity.bioPlaceholder: A short blurb on your seedbox, your taste, or what you're farming this month.

privacy.showLastSeen: Show last-seen on my public profile
privacy.showLastSeenHint: When off, members visiting your public profile see "Hidden" instead of a timestamp. Mods and admins always see the real value for moderation.

security.title: Security
security.twoFactorHint: Add a second factor on top of your password. We support authenticator apps (TOTP) and platform / hardware passkeys. Configure either or both — you'll pick which one to use at sign-in.
security.trustedDevicesHint: Skip the second factor on browsers you've already verified (30 days). Disable to reset.
security.changePasswordHint: Your password never leaves this device. We re-derive a fresh salt + verifier from the new password and replace the stored pair atomically.
security.trackerPasskeyHint: Reveal, copy or rotate your passkey from the tracker credentials section on your profile.
security.signOutDeviceHint: Ends the current session cookie and sends you back to the login page.

torrents.title: Torrent index
torrents.objectsIndexed: {n} object indexed in database | {n} objects indexed in database
